tasks.title: WinUI 3 app + main window bootstrap
tasks.summary: Create the WinUI 3 application entrypoint and first MainWindow bootstrap.
acceptance: manual: verify first MainWindow creation on STA thread

tasks.title: WindowManager and window lifecycle
tasks.summary: Implement WindowManager and the canonical lifecycle states.
acceptance: manual: verify active window tracking and close order

tasks.title: Titlebar / backdrop / fallback
tasks.summary: Implement titlebar customization and Win10/Win11 backdrop fallback behavior.
acceptance: manual: verify backdrop fallback matches support matrix

tasks.title: App command surface + auxiliary windows
tasks.summary: Implement the app-level command surface and the Settings/About auxiliary AppWindows with single-instance ownership.
acceptance: manual: verify app commands route through the single command surface and delegate to WindowManager/TabManager
manual: verify open-settings twice keeps exactly 1 Settings window and re-activates the existing one (single-instance); About behaves identically (02 §7.4)
manual: verify closing an auxiliary window does not terminate the app while a main window is alive (02 §7.4)
manual: verify About window displays version and build identifier

tasks.title: Titlebar chrome controls (drag region, accessor seam, toolbar, command buttons)
tasks.summary: Implement the draggable titlebar handle, window accessor hook, toolbar controller, and titlebar command buttons with shortcut hints.
acceptance: manual: verify empty titlebar drag moves the window and drag over interactive controls does not (02 §8.3)
manual: verify titlebar double-click toggles maximize/restore (02 §8.3)
manual: verify backdrop/titlebar config obtains AppWindow/HWND only via the accessor seam on the UI thread (02 §9.3)
manual: verify titlebar title text updates to the active workspace and command button state mirrors core model (02 §10.3)
manual: verify sidebar/new-workspace/notifications buttons trigger their actions and tooltips show shortcut hints from the 09 schema (02 §11.3)
manual: verify notifications button shows an unread badge when unread > 0 (02 §11.3)
